title: FilterByLink
description: FilterByLink: IRequest that filters all elements from a Revit link with given file name/path, Name parameter value or ElementId.

LinkName.description: Name of the link file (alternatively whole file path, Name parameter value or ElementId) to pull from, case insensitive.

CaseSensitive.description: If true: only perfect, case sensitive text match will be accepted. If false: capitals and small letters will be treated as equal.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
